summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW P1 features: Pre-Arrival Scheduler and Activity Feed (Iteration 203). Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All 7 tabs verified, Scheduler Card functional with Start/Stop/Run Now buttons, Activity Tab shows real-time delivery events.
seed_data_creation: 5 automation rules seeded (including booking_confirmed rule now working)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-Arrival Scheduler and Activity Feed features fully functional. Route: /messaging-dashboard -> Otomasyon tab (scheduler at bottom) and Aktivite tab. Scheduler singleton works correctly with start/stop/run-now. Activity feed auto-refreshes every 10 seconds.

scheduler_endpoints.GET /api/messaging-center/scheduler/stat: PASS - Returns status (running/stopped), interval_hours, total_runs, total_sent, total_skipped, total_errors, last_run_at, last_run_result
scheduler_endpoints.POST /api/messaging-center/scheduler/sta: PASS - Starts scheduler background task, returns success=true with message
PASS - Returns success=true with 'already running' message
scheduler_endpoints.POST /api/messaging-center/scheduler/run: PASS - Manual trigger returns result with run_id, bookings_scanned, events_fired, already_sent, errors

activity_feed_endpoints.GET /api/messaging-center/activity?limit: PASS - Returns unified activity feed with automation and delivery events
activity_feed_endpoints.activity_includes_delivery_events: PASS - Delivery logs appear in activity feed with status field
activity_feed_endpoints.activity_sorted_by_created_at: PASS - Activities sorted descending by created_at

integration_tests.scheduler_requires_pre_arrival_rule: PASS - Scheduler checks for enabled pre_arrival automation rules
integration_tests.scheduler_start_stop_cycle: PASS - Full start/stop cycle maintains correct state
integration_tests.automation_test_creates_notification: PASS - Test trigger creates activity in feed

messaging_dashboard.tabs: PASS - All 7 tabs present (Mesaj Gonder, Sablonlar, Otomasyon, Aktivite, Loglar, Metrikler, Ayarlar)

automation_tab.summary_cards: PASS - 4 cards: Toplam Kural (5), Aktif (5), Toplam Gonderim (0), Basarisiz (2)
automation_tab.automation_rules_list: PASS - 5 rules displayed with trigger badges, channel icons, template names
automation_tab.scheduler_card: PASS - Pre-Arrival Zamanlayici card at bottom with status badge (Aktif/Durduruldu)
automation_tab.scheduler_buttons: PASS - 'Simdi Tara' (Run Now) and 'Baslat/Durdur' (Start/Stop) buttons functional
automation_tab.scheduler_metrics: PASS - Shows Toplam Tarama, Gonderilen, Zaten Gonderilmis, Hata counts
automation_tab.scheduler_last_run: PASS - Shows 'Son tarama' timestamp and interval info

activity_tab.activity_list: PASS - Shows delivery events (WhatsApp Gonderildi, Email Gonderildi, Email Basarisiz)
activity_tab.activity_item_structure: PASS - Each item shows icon, title, recipient, use_case, timestamp, status badge
activity_tab.auto_refresh: PASS - Activity feed auto-refreshes every 10 seconds (verified in code)

mocked_apis.note: MOCKED - Both SMTP email and WhatsApp providers run in SANDBOX mode
mocked_apis.smtp_email: Sandbox mode - no real SMTP connections, returns simulated success
mocked_apis.whatsapp_business_api: Sandbox mode - no real Meta API calls, returns simulated success

scheduler_behavior_notes.singleton_pattern: PreArrivalScheduler uses singleton pattern via get_pre_arrival_scheduler()
scheduler_behavior_notes.scan_logic: Scans bookings with check_in date = tomorrow, status = confirmed, and enabled pre_arrival automation rules
scheduler_behavior_notes.demo_mode_note: In demo mode, bookings are 1-90 days in future (not tomorrow), so bookings_scanned = 0 is expected
